meaning: adj.脱离队伍的,零乱四散的
examples: Her long fair hair was knotted and straggly.
I wish she'd have that straggly grey hair cut.
The voices were coming from a copse of straggly trees.
Gone is the straggly, unkempt beard that was heavily flecked with grey.
On the mainland, the glacier-covered cone of the Cerro Macau volcano peeked above the cloud and the straggly fishing port of Puerto Montt came into view.
